metadata.title: Earnings | Slashie
metadata.description: Track completed Slashie jobs, direct payment records, and worker earnings history.

en.title: Earnings log
en.description: Track completed jobs and direct payment records for your worker activity.
en.pendingHint: Sum of agreed prices on orders still in progress (ACTIVE).
en.completedHint: Sum of agreed prices on closed orders (CLOSED).
en.referenceBody: These totals are for your records. Arrange payment directly with the customer.
en.emptyDescription: Closed orders will appear here once you complete work and record payment.
en.emptyBody: When a customer accepts your quote, it will appear in this list.
en.closedEmptyDescription: Closed orders appear here after you and the customer finish the job on Slashie.
en.closedEmptyBody: Completed work will show agreed amounts for your records.

metadata.title: 收入 | Slashie
metadata.description: 追蹤已完成 Slashie 工作、直接付款記錄和 worker 收入歷史。

zh_hk.title: 收入記錄
zh_hk.description: 追蹤已完成工作和直接付款記錄，掌握你的 worker 活動。
zh_hk.pendingHint: 仍在進行中訂單（ACTIVE）的已同意價格總和。
zh_hk.completedHint: 已關閉訂單（CLOSED）的已同意價格總和。
zh_hk.referenceBody: 這些總額只供你記錄。請直接與 customer 安排付款。
zh_hk.emptyDescription: 完成工作並記錄付款後，已關閉訂單會顯示在這裡。
zh_hk.emptyBody: 當 customer 接受你的報價，訂單會顯示在此清單。
zh_hk.closedEmptyDescription: 你和 customer 在 Slashie 完成工作後，已關閉訂單會顯示在這裡。
zh_hk.closedEmptyBody: 已完成工作會顯示已同意金額，方便你記錄。
